feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IBP to Datasphere with mass extraction of key figure data
entry.content:
Hello Folks!

I'm having problems doing mass extractions from IBP to Datasphere. First i've tried the OData APIs, but According to the API documentation: "If you need to extract large amounts of data, we recommend that you do so using SAP Cloud Integration for data services."

 

After digging for a while, however, I've discovered that the service is no longer available on BTP:

What Is the best practice in this case, then? Extract the data using CI-DS? Or should I just go to Integration Suite with Cloud Integration Like in this blog ?

entry.title: How to send data's SAP Environment Management Module to DataSphere?
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

Greetings of the Day!

I want to know about the process of Sending data's from Environment management module to SAP Data sphere.

Also Could you please  guide me how the data's should flow from EM to Sustainable control Tower Module.

 

Thanks & Regards

Tam

entry.title: Material Alternative Unit of Measure Conversion in DataSphere?
entry.content: Hello DataSphere community.  Would you please share your thoughts and practices on executing Material Alternative Unit of Measure conversion in DataSphere?  With BW and BEX, the custom conversions are quite easy.  Though, I cannot seem to figure out how to complete that same task in DS.  I have seen the documentation on "CONVERT_UNIT", but this is only a T006 and T006D level, which is not Material specific.  Is there a standard for converting UOM using Material Alt UOMs?  If not a standard, can anyone share a work-around to achieve the goal with current DS functionality?

entry.title: how different Data flows,Transformation flows and Replication flows in Datasphere
entry.content: Hi, I am trying to understand the transformation objects in Data builder of Datasphere. why there are 3 different objects for data transformations? I see that Data flows are connecting to sources and apply the transformations using operators like filter, join and aggregation. Transformation flows do almost same, connecting to source and transform the data using Graphical/SQL view transforms. So how do I differentiate them? Please suggest.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere JDBC, ODBC, or other method for reading and writing data
entry.content:
What methods exist for reading and writing data to SAP Datasphere?

I'm aware of the catalog and consumption OData APIs which allow reading metadata and data. I've just learned that there is a Python package `hdbcli` which allows reading and writing data.

I would very much like a Java-friendly approach to reading and writing data.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection with SAP ECC and SAP CRM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to build a data lake architecture in SAP Datasphere. The source systems will be SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 7 and SAP CRM ABAP 7.0 (EHP 1). Are these version of the source systems compatible with Datasphere and what should be the best way to ingest data from these sources?

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: insufficient privilege currency conversion to shared spaces
entry.content:
Hi 

I just want to confirm I'm not doing anything wrong and there is no workaround havng to build out any currency conversions in the 'end' Space raher than a 'shared' view from another space.

I am getting an 'insufficient privilege' error on the TCUR* tables when I use them in a Space where the DB user is assigned to that Space. I have shared the TCUR* tables with that Space, I have also tried doing the conversion in the previous space so it just carries through the 'calculated' fields but both attempts fail with this error.

The only method I have working is to share TCUR* tables with Space, generate TCUR* views of that table in the Space and then create the conversion field in my view in that Space. 

I have a 4 layer architecture (Inbound, Harmonisation, Propogation and Reporting). Propogation is in one Space and Reporting in many spaces (depending on user area). Ideally I would like to do the Currency Conversion in Propogation Space then share that view out to Other Reporting Spaces. Currently I have to recreate all Currency Conversions individually in all reporting Spaces along with ceating views of all TCUR tables in each reporting space.

Can someone confirm that there is no way around this? Seems a little mad, you can share views/tables from another space and DB user can see anything shared, why not currency tables and currency conversion calculations with a shared view?

 

Any help, most appreciated

entry.title: DataSphere "Hierarchy with Directory" configuration problem
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm totally new to the SAP World, over 25 years MS-BI. But now starting with DS.

While trying to configure a Hierarchy with Directory I get everythign setup (at least it reports no errors) but when I try to create a model the hierarchy is totally ignored. I'l try to privode as much info as possible.

This is de model

Regio Dimension, Semantic is Dimension

Regio Hierarchy, Semantic is Hierary with Directory

Here I mssed a bit with the fieldnames but link is ok.

RegioHierarchyNames, Semantic Usage is Dimension

Depending on the samples I found on the web this should be it, but obviously I'm missing something ...

Any suggestions ?

entry.title: SAP BW Bridge InfoObject Hierarchy Re-Use in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Community

I have a question regarding creating a dimension (with a hierarchy) using entities that are imported from SAP BW Bridge.

I have shell converted the info objects from BW system into SAP BW Bridge. I then imported the entities into Datasphere. I would like to now create the dimension in Datasphere.

I followed some of the content on how to create the dimension but seem to always be missing some piece of information. I used the document below and followed some links attached to the document, but I experienced some errors and warnings.
Creating a Dimension | SAP Help Portal

My questions are:
Do I need to create a dimension (semantic usage) type for each entity (attribute, text and hierarchy entities) or do I have to create a dimension using the attribute entity with an association to the text entity. And do something similar for the hierarchy entity?

I am struggling to find content explaining this. May you please point me in the right direction in attaining documentation that explains how to stitch the info object by using these different entities in Datasphere?

Thank you:

Kind regards

Cornelius Faurie (obo Suli Sujee)

entry.title: Space tables exist in other spaces Datasphere
entry.content:
Hey Specs !

Could you please help me out the following issue in SAP datashpere?

I am trying to use replication flow but I run on error.
Error creating replication for dataset BSEG: space tables exist in other spaces: BSEG found in 0024d3e2-9959-4d02-81ad-3f02458be850

I've checked all my replication flow but none of it contains the same table from the same .
 I am using one SLT server for multiple SAP ERP. 
I do not know if it can cause this issue but I transport BSEG table from multiple ERP systems through 1 SLT.

entry.title: Hierarchy with Directory Hierarchy in Datasphere to be used in variables
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a hierarchy with the Hierarchy with Directory method in Datasphere. The hierarchy works in SAC as expected.

However, we want to display the hierarchy in variables created in Analytic Model on top of the Dimension which has the Hierarchy with Directory association. When we try it we don't see the hierarchy in variables. Its just a flat presentation. The hierarchy created has only 1 hierarchy.

Is it possible to display the hierarchical structure in variables created in Analytic model if the hierarchy is created using Hierarchy with Directory method? Which is the best suitable way to create a hierarchy so we can show hierarchy structure in variables created in Analytic model.

Any inputs are much appreciated.

Thank You,

Rohan

entry.title: SQL Database to datasphere vis DP connetor
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to connect to SQL server through DP agent. I am getting this error:

Error

Connection "SA**** couldn’t be established. - Data flows can’t be used because of errors in the connection. - Replication flows are not supported. - Remote tables can’t be used because of errors in the connection.


Data Flows: Cause: Open request could not be performed due to error: Timeout expired. select failed: 2
Invalid attribute in connection string: DriverUnicodeType.
Remote Tables: Unable to connect remote source: Adapter validation failed. [DWC_*******]Failed to establish JDBC connection. Error: Fehler bei der Anmeldung für den Benutzer "datasphere". ClientConnectionId:**************, Code: 5921, SQL State: HY000

Could Someone help me out with this problem. Thank you

 

Microsoft SQL Server SAP Datasphere #dPAgent

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection to AWS Aurora postgresql
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need a connection from SAP Datasphere to AWS Aurora Postgresql. Is it possible through a generic JDBC connection?

1.Open <DPAgent_root>/camel/adapters.xml and uncomment the configuration of Camel JDBC Adapter.

2.Download the appropriate JDBC file, and copy it to the <DPAgent_root>/camel/lib directory.

3. Restart DP Agent

4. Create remote source from SAP Hana database explorer

Thanks in advance,

Antonio

entry.title: How to read Correlation ID Received in Datashpere
entry.content:
Hey Specs !

I've a probplem

When accessing DataSphere I sometimes receive Error with no error message but only a correlation ID.

 

But I couldn't find anywhere to check on with these correlation ID. 

Could you please help me out how to proceed with these correlation ID-s ? 

Thanks Andris

entry.title: Datasphere Error/Dataload log
entry.content:
Hey Specs ,

Could you please help me out with the following.

I couldn't find in Datasphere where are all the error log therefore it is very hard to dig in into issues.

For example in this case I cannot import a table for the HR Systems but I do not see why because even if I click on the Information icon nothing happens.

So I have absolutly no lead what is going on.

Could you please help me out where are the Datalogs in Datasphere

entry.title: Extract Delta Records from SAP ECC & CRM into Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to build a data lake architecture in SAP Datasphere. The source systems will be SAP ECC 6.0 EHP 7 and SAP CRM ABAP 7.0 (EHP 1). What should be the best way to ingest data from these sources? How to extract delta records? Do we need BW Bridge or SAP DI should work?

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Bring SAP Concur Data to SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hi, I was reading the following articles (part 1 and part 2) of these talk about bringing Expense data into SAP Datasphere. In addition to Expense, does anyone know how to successfully bring in Request data into SAP Datasphere, alongside Expense. Is this option available and if so, I would be grateful for your help.

entry.title: Initialize delta flag for a Delta DTP in BW Bridge
entry.content:
Good day Community

Is there an option in BW Bridge to initialize the delta flag on a DTP with a delta load setting? There is an option in BW to initialize the flag on the info package. I cannot seem to find a similar option in BW Bridge especially since info packages are no longer supported. 
I searched for a similar option in BW Bridge but only found the delta initialization without data. 

Is the only option to load a full load and then initialize the flag by selecting the "delta initialization without data"?

Thank you

Regards
Sulaiman

entry.title: Current_Data() in YYYYMM format in Datasphere View
entry.content:
I'm looking for the best way to format the current date into YYYYMM in a Datasphere View format so for today it should be 202406. To I have to format it as a string first and then recoverd it to date with TO_DATE()?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Trail Datasphere Analytical models are not appearing in Trail SAP Analytics Cloud - Live Connect
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have created SAP trail Datasphere and Trail SAP Analytics Cloud accounts.

Datasphere: In data builder, i have created a table and uploaded the data from CSV file. On top of this table, i have created a new graphical view and enabled Expose for Consumption. Then , i have created new Analytic model as a last step.

SAP Analytics Cloud : In SAC, I created a Live connection to the Datasphere and it was successful. Then, when i try to create a story and consume the analytical model using this live connection, i don't see this model appearing and space is empty.

Can you any help/ or suggest what is the issue?.

Regards,

Manoj
